title: Minecraft Seven Mono (Font)
description: Default minecraft font, but with monospaced characters. Based on default font, not Monocraft.
body:
# 󠀠󠀠 About Requested by keksuccino, made by me
Use this resourcepack as you wish

Q: 1.18 or lower?
A: You can use 1.19 version and ignore the warning, but support is not guaranteed.

Q: How to contact you?
A: @xllifi on Discord.

Q: What about actually maintaining the resourcepack?
A: Open an issue on GitHub, I'll respond and update / expand the resourcepack in my free time. ### License This project uses CC-BY 4.0
[![CC-BY 4.0](https://i.imgur.com/XBu1mBH.png)](https://github.com/xlifi/monospace-seven/blob/main/LICENSE.md)
You are free to use this font wherever you want as long as you credit me or provide a link to this page.
